caption: A screen recording shows a website titled "RANDOM.ORG" under the header "True Random Number Service." A "List Randomizer" is used to shuffle a list of 48 items, which appear to be sports cards. The list includes entries such as "1. SEAN BURKE 16/20," "2. JIM MALONEY 16/20," and "3. TIM McDONOUGH 16/20." In the top right of the screen, a small video window displays a man wearing a black t-shirt sitting in a room with a grey wall. A red "Subscribe" button with the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" is positioned at the bottom right of the main content area. The bottom of the screen features a white banner with the text "WWW.JAYSCAKEBREAKS.COM" repeated multiple times. As the video progresses, the list of names on the website is refreshed and re-randomized, shifting the order of the numbered entries.
